content.full_text:
December 16, 1992

Mr. Ben Davidian, Chairman  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 600  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Davidian:

It is my understanding that upon the conclusion of my term as the Director of Finance, I will be free to immediately begin lobbying the Legislature and those executive branch functions over which I had no direct operational control. It is my further understanding that I will be restricted from lobbying the Department of Finance and all Boards and Commissions for which I am a member for a period of one year after my final date of employment.

Please advise me in writing as to whether or not this information is correct.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
THOMAS W. HAYES  
Director
